title: coccocypselum buxifolium
intro: Coccocypselum buxifolium, also known as West Indian lemongrass or box-leaved citronella, is a tropical plant native to the Americas and the Caribbean, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Coccocypselum buxifolium include relief from digestive problems, fever reduction, and treatment of skin conditions such as wounds and cuts. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
